case_title: NARENDRAKUMAR PATEL et al VS. DAVID ZALKUS et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NARENDRAKUMAR PATEL, JASHUBEN AS TO DEFENDANT ZALKUS, DAVID DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NARENDRAKUMAR PATEL, JASHUBEN SERVED MAY-16-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZALKUS, DAVID
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NARENDRAKUMAR PATEL, JASHUBEN AS TO DEFENDANT ZALKUS, DAVID
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ZALKUS, DAVID

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, NARENDRAKUMAR PATEL, JASHUBEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZALKUS, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 27 DASHIEL HAMMETT STRET, #6 SAN FRANCISCI, CA 94108, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ZALKUS, DAVID
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ZALKUS, DAVID
